positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical celestial mandala featuring glowing cosmic flora, stylized constellations, and nebulae structures. The design must be rendered in a clean, vibrant, vector-art style with thick, consistent outlines and distinct graphic elements. Use a palette dominated by deep indigo, sapphire blue, glowing teal, gold foil accents, and magenta gradients. The composition should be perfectly centralized, allowing for scalable print placement. Strong silhouette definition and high contrast are crucial. Stylized scientific illustration meets mythological tapestry, designed for screen printing on dark apparel. Minimalist yet maximalist composition.
negative: blur, grainy, lowres, watermark, text, logo, signature, debris, artifacts, extra limbs, fused fingers, bad anatomy, noisy, photorealistic, messy, cluttered, grayscale
